title: unwrap
description: Returns a deep clone of the underlying data from a store proxy, stripping all reactivity.
usage_the_store_source: The site publisher holds its file manifest in a store from <0>createManifestStore</0>. Every <1>ManifestEntry</1> a child reads is a reactive proxy, not a plain object.
usage_snapshotting_props: Each <0>SiteObject</0> receives a manifest entry as a reactive prop. Its handler props call <1>unwrap</1> on that entry so the async upload works from a plain, detached snapshot rather than a live proxy.
in_the_wild: See this snapshot feed S3 uploads in the <0>site-publisher walkthrough</0>.
